## About What will the price of WTI oil be On Apr 1, 2026? This market is based on the front-month settle price for a barrel of West Texas Intermediate oil. Outcome verified from ICE. The Underlying for this Contract is the settle price of Intercontinental Exchange’s (“ICE”) front-month West Texas Intermediate (“WTI”) Light Sweet Crude Future for. If the last trading date of the ICE contract is, the day prior to, or two days prior to, the Underlying will be the settle price for the following month. For example, if the last trading date of the Apr24 ICE contract is March 19, 2024, then beginning with March 17th, the Underlying will be the settle price of the May24 contract.
